title: Property Consultant - NoBroker - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - NoBroker - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
NoBroker has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About NoBroker:
NoBroker is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NoBroker!
